import React from 'react'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Cell } from 'recharts'; import { Brain, HelpCircle, TrendingDown, Target } from 'lucide-react'; const XaiDashboard = ({ data, causal }) => { if (!data || data.length === 0) return null; return (
{/* SHAP Explanation */}

Physiological Drivers (XAI)

{data.map((entry, index) => ( 0 ? '#f43f5e' : '#10b981'} /> ))}

Red indicates Risk Increase | Green indicates Risk Mitigation

{/* Causal Insight */}

Causal Simulation

{causal ? (
Counterfactual Scenario

"{causal.question}"

Simulated Outcome

{causal.outcome}

The AI identifies this as a Key Mitigation Vector. Addressing this specific factor has the highest causal impact on your risk score.

) : (

)}
Powered by DoWhy CausalML Engine Est. Confidence: 94.2%
); }; export default XaiDashboard;
